QUICK LOOKUP: FIND ITEM BY NUMBER
================================================================================

Need details on a specific item?

1. Go to: /Users/sac/mcpp/tai-erlang-autonomics/execution/
2. Open: COMPREHENSIVE_100_ITEM_CHECKLIST.md
3. Use Find (Ctrl+F): Search for "Item [NUMBER]:"
4. Read: Full details including status, evidence, owner, metrics

OR

1. Open: CHECKLIST_INDEX.md
2. Jump to: Section "Item [NUMBER]" or search by category
3. Links provided to full details

NEXT STEPS

1. READ:
   → START_HERE_COMPREHENSIVE_CHECKLIST.md (entry point)
   → COMPREHENSIVE_100_ITEM_CHECKLIST.md (main document)

2. REVIEW:
   → Weeks 1-2 section (100% complete - verify evidence)
   → Weeks 3-4 section (currently in progress)
   → Preview Weeks 5-13 (understand critical path)

3. TRACK:
   → Daily standup at 3pm EST (update items 41-60)
   → Weekly review Friday 4pm (move completed items)
   → Monthly board meeting (review revenue metrics)

4. CELEBRATE:
   → Week 4 end: 20 discovery calls complete
   → Week 7: **FIRST REVENUE** ($50K ACV)
   → Week 9: **$125K+ ARR** achieved
